bgpt.description: Search scientific papers with full-text experimental data via BGPT. 50 free searches, no API key needed.

fetch.description: Fetch web pages, documentation, and research resources as markdown.

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph for tracking research findings, citations, and insights across sessions.

filesystem.description: Read and write research notes, papers, and data files. Replace the placeholder with your project root.

brave-search.description: Web search for supplementary sources, preprints, and grey literature.
